tests.name: pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/python returns the nearest Python project root before the workspace root
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/python deduplicates the workspace root when it is also the Python project root
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonPaths resolves relative package imports by climbing parent directories and checking __init__.py
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonPaths resolves absolute imports from each search root and its src directory
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonImports adds import relations and bindings for dotted-name and aliased imports
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonImports ignores non-module children and falls back to the first named child for aliased imports
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonImports skips import entries without a resolved specifier
extension/pipeline/treesitter/python dispatches python syntax nodes to the matching handlers
extension/pipeline/treesitter/python passes the current symbol id through to python call handlers
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonSymbols adds class symbols only when the class definition has a name
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonSymbols creates function and method symbols and walks only the symbol body
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonSymbols adds call relations for identifier and attribute-based imported bindings only
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonImportFrom adds a module import relation when the statement has no imported bindings
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonImportFrom adds aliased imported bindings and skips entries without an imported name
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonImportFromNodes selects the first relative or dotted module node
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonImportFromNodes filters imported nodes to dotted or aliased names while excluding the module node
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/pythonImportFromNodes reads imported names from alias targets and plain nodes
